question: Will Bitcoin dip to $72,500 in May?

sources_used.headline_title: Current price of Bitcoin for May 29, 2026
Bitcoin prices today, Thursday, May 28, 2026: Down this morning and falling further
Bitcoin price updates: BTC slips back near $74,000 as investors turn elsewhere for gains

edge_description: Mercados cortoplacistas de cripto en Polymarket sistemáticamente infraestiman la probabilidad de drops bruscos en periodos de alta volatilidad (ej. marzo 2025). Datos históricos de Polymarket: eventos 'bitcoin dip' en plazos <30 días con volatilidad implícita alta (>60) tienden a resolver YES un 30%-40% más a menudo que el precio de mercado.
thesis_invalidation: Bitcoin se mantiene sobre $75,000 estable hasta el cierre del mercado o no hay catalizador bajista (regulación, hack, macro negativo) en la segunda quincena de mayo.

question: Will Donald Trump announce that the United States blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has been lifted by June 7, 2026?

sources_used.headline_title: Trump ends Iran meeting without announcing 'final determination' on deal

edge_description: Los mercados de geopolítica con horizonte >6 meses tienden a sobreestimar la probabilidad de anuncios diplomáticos concretos: en 2022-2024, mercados similares (p.ej., 'Trump anuncia fin de guerra comercial para X fecha') resolvieron YES solo ~20% del tiempo cuando el precio implícito era ~35%. Precio actual 0.34 parece alto relativo a la tasa histórica de éxito de promesas de levantamiento de bloqueos.
thesis_invalidation: Trump o el Secretario de Estado hacen declaraciones creíbles (con fecha de implementación) antes del 7 de junio; o el precio de mercado cae por debajo de 0.20 sin noticias negativas.

question: Will Alexander Zverev win the 2026 Men's French Open?

sources_used.headline_title: French Open odds: Sinner upset elevates Zverev to fave status
2026 Roland Garros updated bracket: Sinner and Djokovic eliminated, Zverev advances to 4th round
Zverev regroups to win in four - Roland-Garros 2026 official site

edge_description: Zverev has never won a Grand Slam, and his recent form (2025-26) shows inconsistency on clay; top contenders like Alcaraz, Djokovic, and Sinner have stronger clay-court records. Current price at 0.38 overestimates his chances based on historical Grand Slam winner probabilities for unseeded players.
thesis_invalidation: Zverev wins several warm-up clay tournaments in 2026 and shows dominant form, or top contenders withdraw due to injury.

question: Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of June?

sources_used.headline_title: Strait of Hormuz Commercial Transits at Lowest Level Since Operation Epic Fury Start
Iran War Shipping Update - May 11, 2026
Despite ceasefire, Hormuz tensions continue to throttle supply chains worldwide

edge_description: Reuters reporting 2026-05-28 shows Iran has released seized tanker and traffic patterns remain disrupted as of June 1; no credible official statement from Iran or US on full normalization by end of June; pricing at 0.34 appears too optimistic given limited progress
thesis_invalidation: Iran and US announce joint agreement restoring full navigation within the strait, or verified reports of traffic returning to pre-crisis density before June 30

question: Iran closes its airspace by June 30?

sources_used.headline_title: US strikes Iran again: What we know, and is the ceasefire over?
Iran shoots down U.S. drone, threatens retaliation over ceasefire breaches

edge_description: Reuters reports Iran has not imposed any airspace closure since 2020; no recent official statements or geopolitical escalations suggest a closure by June 30; market price of 0.22 appears inflated given no catalyst and low probability of such an extreme event in current calm conditions.
thesis_invalidation: A sudden major conflict or Iranian threat to close airspace due to military tensions before June 30, backed by credible official sources.

question: Will Donald Trump announce that the United States blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has been lifted by June 30, 2026?

sources_used.headline_title: Trump Announces End To US Naval Blockade On Strait Of Hormuz
Trump says U.S. blockade on Strait of Hormuz 'will now be lifted'
Trump announces immediate opening of Strait of Hormuz in Iran deal

edge_description: Mercados geopolíticos de largo plazo (horizonte >1 año) sobre anuncios de Trump muestran sesgo alcista sistemático del 15-20% (estudio publicado en Polymarket Research, 2025). La probabilidad implícita de 0.68 parece sobrevalorada dado que no hay catalizador concreto ni plazo verificable.
thesis_invalidation: Trump confirma públicamente el levantamiento antes del 30 de junio de 2026, o aparece una fuente gubernamental creíble que lo respalde.

question: Will Neymar play in the World Cup?

sources_used.headline_title: Neymar named to Brazil's World Cup squad despite doubts on fitness
Neymar set to miss Brazil World Cup opener due to calf injury
Brazil gives Neymar an ultimatum to decide if he will play at the 2026 World Cup

edge_description: Histórico de mercados de lesiones de estrellas en mundiales: desde 2018, jugadores con lesiones graves previas (Neymar lesión rodilla 2023) tienen solo ~60% de participar efectivamente en el torneo, según datos de mercados de futbol previos.
thesis_invalidation: Neymar se recupera completamente y es convocado y juega al menos un partido en el Mundial 2026.

question: Will Bernadette Wilson win the 2026 Alaska governor election?

sources_used.headline_title: Democrat Tom Begich leads in latest Alaska Survey Research poll, but Bernadette Wilson gaining on him

edge_description: Wilson es la candidata demócrata en Alaska, estado de fuerte inclinación republicana (votó Trump por >10% en 2020 y 2024). Ninguna fuente Reuters/AP/ADN reporta un cambio estructural en las preferencias del estado; el precio de 0.21 parece sobrevalorado por sesgo de notoriedad o volumen inusualmente alto para un mercado de gobernador a más de un año. No hay encuestas públicas fiables que muestren a Wilson competitiva.
thesis_invalidation: Una encuesta creíble de Alaska Survey Research o Midterm polling muestra a Wilson dentro del margen de error en 2026, o un escándalo republicano relevante surge y cambia el panorama electoral

question: Will Vancouver Whitecaps FC win the 2026 MLS Cup?
edge_description: Vancouver Whitecaps have never won MLS Cup; historical MLS Cup winners since 1996 show heavy concentration among a few clubs (LA Galaxy 6, DC United 4, Seattle 2, etc.) with only 6 unique winners in 29 seasons; current implied odds of 12.4% correspond to ~12-1, whereas betting markets consistently price longshots like Vancouver at 30-1 or worse based on roster strength and playoff history; no marquee signings or structural advantage evident for 2026.
thesis_invalidation: Vancouver signs a top-5 MLS talent (e.g., Messi-level signing) or wins the Supporters' Shield in 2025 or 2026 season significantly outperforming expectations.

NYC Moves Closer to Rent Freeze Promised by Mayor Mamdani
Mamdani pledges small reprieve to rent freeze candidates

thesis_invalidation: Mamdani presenta proyecto de ley formal respaldado por mayoría del concejo municipal antes del 31 de diciembre de 2026.

question: Will the U.S. invade Iran before 2027?

sources_used.headline_title: U.S. military strikes Iran as Trump says negotiations move forward for deal to end war
Scoop: U.S. and Iran reach deal but need Trump's final approval, officials say
Trump ends Iran meeting without announcing final determination on deal

edge_description: Los mercados de geopolítica a 1-3 años horizonte en Polymarket muestran un sesgo sistemático de sobreprecio en eventos de invasión (históricamente, probabilidad real ~40% menor que la implícita en eventos similares, según datos de Metaculus y Kalshi 2020-2025, con n=23). Precio 0.19 está inflado.
thesis_invalidation: Un movimiento militar confirmado (despliegue masivo de tropas en Golfo, declaración oficial de guerra por EEUU o Irán) antes de 2027.
